nation: Mosquito Grizzly Bears Head Lean Man First Nation
one_time_description: Mosquito Legacy Trust (1905 Surrender) - large non-recurring transfer related to historical land surrender settlement
economic_notes: First Nation invested in North Battleford Hospitality Limited (Comfort Inn Suites) acquiring 12.08% (640,000 shares). Also holds investment in Avord Towers through Battleford Tribal Council. Four GBEs: TLE Makah Holding Corp, Economic Development Company LP, Economic Development Company Ltd, and Petroleum Company Ltd.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 statements were signed June 29-30, 2023 (over a year late). Massive one-time revenue of $47.2M from Mosquito Legacy Trust (1905 Surrender) land claim settlement dominates the year, producing a large surplus. Four GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis - not consolidated line-by-line. TLE Trust and Mosquito Legacy Trust are excluded from consolidation as they are governed by external trustees. Addition of reserve lands of $460,696 recorded separately. Short-term financing of $3.8M from prior year fully repaid. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($16,279,075) + CMHC ($642,451) + Saskatchewan Government ($39,655) + SITAG ($455,857) + Trust funds ($459,391) = $17,876,429; OSR = total revenue minus government transfers. Deferred revenue includes $6,763,409 ISC unexpended and $1,363,875 other. Current liabilities include deferred revenue ISC and other totalling $8,127,284 plus accounts payable $1,938,632 plus current LTD $169,130 plus current CMHC $54,217 plus due to related parties $33,145.
